rationale: Library check shipped with README, check.yaml template, Go implementation, and self-tests covering all required cases (unwired blocks, wired passes, pending-annotation against open/closed/missing beads, _test.go exclusion). Project opts in via .ddx/checks/production-reachability.yaml; per-attempt evidence written.

findings.summary: Evidence reports 'no non-test Go files changed' — the changed Go sources live in library/checks/... while the configured module-dir is cli/, so the check correctly degenerated to pass for this attempt; the dogfood signal will appear on cli/-touching beads.
wiring:pending parser uses Fields(rest+" ")[0] which works but is idiomatically odd; harmless.
